message:
🐛 Fix spread syntax and demo mode crashes on /users, /compute/compare, /gpu-reservations, /namespaces (#11047)

- Replace `data || []` with `Array.isArray(data) ? data : []` in useUsers.ts
  to guard against non-iterable API responses (e.g. {} from mock catch-all)
- Add || [] guard on spread in UserManagement.tsx
- Set expectCards: false for standalone pages (/compute/compare,
  /gpu-reservations, /namespaces, /marketplace) in dashboard health test
  since these are full-page layouts, not card-based dashboards

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ const DASHBOARD_ROUTES: Array<{ path: string; name: string; expectCards: boolean
   { path: '/helm', name: 'Helm Releases', expectCards: true },
   { path: '/logs', name: 'Logs', expectCards: true },
   { path: '/compute', name: 'Compute', expectCards: true },
-  { path: '/compute/compare', name: 'Cluster Comparison', expectCards: true },
+  { path: '/compute/compare', name: 'Cluster Comparison', expectCards: false },
   { path: '/storage', name: 'Storage', expectCards: true },
   { path: '/network', name: 'Network', expectCards: true },
   { path: '/events', name: 'Events', expectCards: true },
